prompt: A single [food subject] on a [surface] — [lens] overhead locked directly above, the [food subject] centred with [negative space] on all four sides, [one shadow] the only other element in the frame, [color relationship] between the [food subject] and [surface] deliberate and precise, [light source] from [light direction] casting [one shadow] at a specific angle, no props, no context, no garnish — the [food subject] and its shadow as the complete composition, minimalist overhead food still, 16:9 Create this as a simple cinematic thumbnail still for a prompt library card. Clean single-scene composition. Readable at small size. Strong central subject. No text, no interface chrome, no split panels, no collage, no before-after comparisons.
negative_prompt: text overlay, typography, UI chrome, dashboard, website layout, collage, split screen, diptych, triptych, before-and-after, watermark, logo, cluttered composition, too many objects, cartoon, illustration, duplicate objects, warped geometry, unreadable tiny details

settings.lighting: clean, readable, high-contrast lighting suited for a small homepage or library card
settings.camera_angle: single clear hero framing that matches the prompt
settings.depth_of_field: moderate depth of field for thumbnail readability
settings.quality: clean silhouette, realistic materials, readable at small size
